title: MCC: Island - Companion (MCCI)
body: **MCCI: Companion** is the companion mod for the **MCC: Island** Minecraft server! --- - **Chat:** chat mentions and tweaks to chat functionality! - **HUD:** performance improvements and custom HUD! - **Music:** implements the event music! - **Quality of Life:** miscellaneous tweaks, fixes, and performance improvements! - **Toasts:** converts spammy chat messages into popup toasts! - **Discord Rich Presence** - **Key Bindings** --- https://mccisland.net | [MCCI: Companion - Chat & Support (Discord)](https://discord.gg/rHjPjUzhUQ) | [![wakatime](https://wakatime.com/badge/user/a0b35871-15c1-415a-be82-6cab5cc0c09a/project/fc0c69e2-7943-4902-9a42-723bdefd9010.svg)](https://wakatime.com/badge/user/a0b35871-15c1-415a-be82-6cab5cc0c09a/project/fc0c69e2-7943-4902-9a42-723bdefd9010) --- ## Update Toasts ![quest toast](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/680748717644578880/1033708823984218192/unknown.png) ![badge toast](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/680748717644578880/1078043411598278686/image.png) ![mcc 26 update](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/680748717644578880/1035388700810563674/unknown.png) ## Friend Toasts ![Friend leave](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/680748717644578880/1035387485842321428/unknown.png) ![Party leave](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/680748717644578880/1035387534508830830/unknown.png) ![Party disband](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/680748717644578880/1035387606722170960/unknown.png) --- ### For developers As of v5.0, the exposed MCCI: Companion API has been discontinued.
